data.title: TriNet Unveils Platform Innovations Purpose-Built for Today's Small and Medium-Size Businesses
data.description: At the Transform event in Las Vegas on March 24, 2026, it was announced that small and medium-sized businesses (SMBs) now have access to new AI-powered HR support. This system also includes integrations for global workforce management, IT asset tracking, and retirement plan services all in one platform. This development aims to streamline workforce management for SMBs. The announcement was made in the premier global community event that focuses on driving innovation in human resource solutions.

data.title: eschbach Unveils Shiftconnector Activity Scheduler
data.description: A recent development in the pharmaceutical industry offers a tool to optimize daily production planning, minimize manual tasks, and enhance batch execution efficiency. Released in Boston on March 24, 2026, eschbach unveiled its latest innovation, the Shiftconnector Activity Scheduler. This feature aims to assist pharma manufacturing teams by streamlining their operations, ultimately leading to improved timely execution of batches.

data.title: Verana Health and Guardant Health Partner to Advance Precision Medicine with Real-World Data
data.description: Verana Health®, a leading digital health company, announced in San Francisco on March 24, 2026, that they are integrating top-tier electronic health record (EHR) data with genomics. This merger of superior, diverse EHR data with genomics is aimed at deepening insights into patients' medical paths and bolstering the development of new therapies. The precise numbers and details are withheld.

data.title: Archer Public Affairs Launches New Website
data.description: TRENTON, N.J., March 24, 2026 - Archer Public Affairs (APA), a prominent government affairs firm in the region and affiliated with Archer & Greiner, has introduced its revamped brand with the launch of a new website. As a bipartisan firm specializing in government and regulatory affairs, APA solidifies its position as a leader in the sector. The updated website showcases their expertise and commitment to serving clients effectively. This move underscores APA’s dedication to remaining at the forefront of the industry.

data.title: Universal Technical Institute Announces Three-Year Partnership with Fuji Spray Auto
data.description: A leading spray gun provider will assist UTI's collision repair and aviation programs nationwide in the U.S. As of March 24, 2026, the partnership with Universal Technical Institute (UTI) will benefit students pursuing automotive/diesel, skilled trades, electrical, and energy education. This collaboration is set to enhance training opportunities across various fields, ensuring access to top-quality equipment and knowledge for learners.

data.title: For Third Consecutive Year, Mazda Leads the Industry in IIHS TOP SAFETY PICK+ Awards
data.description: In the latest safety rankings released by the Insurance Institute for Highway Safety (IIHS) on March 24, 2026, Mazda vehicles have secured a total of eight 2026 TOP SAFETY PICK+ awards. This remarkable achievement solidifies Mazda's position as the brand with the most top safety awards for the year, outperforming all other automotive manufacturers. This marks the third consecutive year that Mazda has emerged as a top contender for safety awards in the automotive industry.

data.title: VIVIFY Technology Joins President Donald J. Trump and National Leaders at Palm Beach County Lincoln Day Gala, Showcasing Florida-First Leadership in Energy Innovation
data.description: On March 20, 2026, VIVIFY Technology participated in the Palm Beach County Lincoln Day Gala at Mar-a-Lago in Palm Beach, Florida. The event was attended by President Donald J. Trump and various national leaders, policymakers, and business executives.

data.title: Tampa General Hospital and USF Health Named Cancer Center of Excellence in Florida
data.description: Tampa General Hospital (TGH) Cancer Institute, in collaboration with USF Health Morsani College of Medicine, achieved a major milestone by receiving state recognition on March 24, 2026. This adds to the institution's already impressive national awards and highlights its commitment to excellence. This designation further solidifies TGH's position as a leader in cancer care, with significant accomplishments in the field.

data.title: iTHINK Financial Selects Tyfone’s nFinia® Digital Banking Platform to Elevate Member Experience
data.description: A digital banking solutions company, Tyfone, revealed that iTHINK Financial Credit Union has opted for its nFinia® Digital Banking platform to offer a comprehensive self-service digital banking experience to its members. iTHINK Financial, based in Delray Beach, Fla., boasts over $2.3 billion in assets and a membership of 170,000 individuals. The credit union plans to utilize nFinia to broaden its reach, diminish branch visits, and furnish members with enhanced self-service capabilities.

data.title: CaryHealth and HealthDyne Partner to Power Scalable, End-to-End Direct-to-Patient Programs
data.description: In Washington, CaryHealth, a digital health innovator, has revealed a new partnership with HealthDyne, a prominent digital pharmacy services firm. The collaboration aims to enhance the support system for CaryHealth's direct-to-patient initiatives, enabling patients to receive medications more quickly and reliably, with improved transparency and convenience. CaryHealth's platform, designed to expand efficiently, employs automated pharmacy processes and a varied fulfillment network. Through this partnership, the companies are focused on leveraging AI-driven technologies.

IRAN IMPOSES STRAIT OF HORMUZ TOLL Iran is reportedly charging some commercial vessels up to $2 million per transit through the Strait of Hormuz, signaling tighter control over the key energy route. Payments are ad hoc and irregular, with details on currency and process unclear.
Effective fed funds rate: 3.64% March 23rd vs 3.64% March 20th

data.title: AppDirect Doubles Down on Provider Success, Marketplace Expansion, and “B2B Everything Store” Vision with Strategic Leadership Hire
data.description: In San Francisco, the top B2B commerce platform, AppDirect, revealed the hiring of Mariane Louvet as their new Director of Provider Management. In this role, she will oversee the growth and development of the provider ecosystem, reinforcing AppDirect's dedication to providers' prosperity. Louvet's appointment comes amidst AppDirect's expansion of direct and indirect cloud provider distribution throughout North America and advancement of its marketplace vision.

data.title: Thryv Launches AI Lead Flow, Unifying Marketing and Sales Automation for Small Businesses
data.description: Thryv® Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: THRY), a key player in small business marketing and sales software, unveiled Thryv AI Lead Flow™ in Dallas, Texas. This innovative solution integrates online visibility, intelligent lead handling, and automated sales follow-ups, offering a seamless experience that operates without manual intervention from the business owner once established. The launch responds to a growing need, reflecting data from the Federal Reserve's Small Business Credit Survey. This strategic move aims to enhance customer outreach and streamline sales processes for small businesses.

data.title: New Omnissa 2026 Study Finds Shadow AI, Security Gaps, and Device Instability Expose Need for End-to-End IT Observability
data.description: In Mountain View, California, Omnissa®, a prominent digital work platform firm, unveiled its State of Digital Workspace 2026 report. This comprehensive study analyzed telemetry data from millions of Omnissa-managed enterprise endpoints over the course of 2025. The report highlighted a challenging IT landscape characterized by widespread AI integration, diverse device usage, and inconsistent security measures. These trends are complicating the task of IT teams in effectively managing and safeguarding enterprise environments.

data.title: Brivo Integrates with Cobalt AI to Deliver Advanced Security Incident Management and Resolution for Enterprise
data.description: A partnership between Brivo and Cobalt AI was announced, aiming to enhance security incident management for companies. Brivo, a major player in cloud-based physical security, is teaming up with Cobalt AI, known for its monitoring intelligence solutions. Through this integration, Cobalt AI will have access to data from Brivo Security Suite, including information from access control, video, intrusion, and sensors. By utilizing artificial intelligence, the system will swiftly evaluate security risks and respond effectively to potential threats. This collaboration promises to provide enterprises with advanced security measures for comprehensive protection.

data.title: OtterBox Expands Phone Case Lineup for New iPhone 17e
data.description: In Fort Collins, Colorado, on March 24, 2026, OtterBox announced the expansion of its product line for the latest iPhone 17e. The company introduced a wide range of protective cases, offering both style and security. The launch comprises various new and revamped designs under the Figura Series, showcasing the brand's commitment to providing comprehensive protection for the newest iPhone model.

data.title: Drata Unveils Industry-First Agentic AI Capabilities to Transform Enterprise Trust Workflows
data.description: In San Francisco, Drata has launched innovative agentic AI capabilities that aim to shift trust from reactive verification to proactive, continuous implementation. This move marks a significant advancement in the industry, emphasizing the importance of staying ahead of potential issues through AI technology.

data.title: KONGSBERG launches Sonar AI, a virtual sonar operator powered by Viam
data.description: A new virtual sonar operator, Sonar AI, has been unveiled by Viam, the robotics software platform. This technology offers captains a constant fish detection system that notifies crews in real-time. Operating like a permanent virtual crew member, Sonar AI was introduced in PALM BEACH, Fla., on March 24, 2026. This innovative tool enhances maritime operations by providing continuous monitoring for fish detection.

data.title: Cyera Closes Major Gaps in Securing Enterprise AI
data.description: Cyera, an AI Security Platform, unveiled new features aimed at enhancing security in AI usage. The tools include Browser Shield for AI, Data Lineage for files, and Cyera MCP. These tools address significant security vulnerabilities in AI adoption by monitoring employee interactions with AI and data usage within the enterprise. The introduction of Cyera MCP server enables enterprises to establish their security protocols. The new capabilities aim to tackle the issue of unauthorized data access and usage, providing enhanced protection for enterprise information.
